description: Synthetic SnibeLis ASTM E1394 result upload for MAGLUMI X3: documented ENQ/STX/content/ETX/EOT session ACKs, H/P/O/R/R/L records, ^^^ assay identifiers, raw units and abnormal flags, normalized to LOINC/UCUM (LIS-32). NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-108 / S3.0a); SnibeLis LIS User Manual v1.1 Appendix A Network Interface, result transmission example
source.note: Application payload only. The SnibeLis simulator applies the manual's simplified ENQ/STX/content/ETX/EOT envelope and ACKs ENQ, STX, ETX and EOT. The manual examples omit E1381 frame numbers and checksums; live SnibeLis capture must confirm whether production uses this simplified envelope or full E1381 framing. channel.tcp.port 12021 mirrors the planned dedicated X3 listener (LIS-174 plan D3, org.itech.ahb.listen-astm-server.snibe); channel.identity analyzer_id/host_id ('Maglumi User'/'Lis') are vision-extracted vendor-doc screenshot values, unverified — LIS-75 bench capture pins all of these (LIS-175).

terminology.note: Minimal synthetic MAGLUMI X3 immunoassay seed (LIS-32) — the two assays in this fixture only. Codes come solely from this channel block (bridge contract: codeToLoinc is per-analyzer data, never a shared seed). NOT a complete or site-verified MAGLUMI assay dictionary; real code strings + units graduate with a SnibeLis capture (LIS-75/LIS-38).
